concept: Modern Newspaper / Cultural Magazine. Professional yet versatile ('sirvo para un roto y para un descosio'). It balances the gravitas of investigative journalism with elegant brand journalism.

headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, large pull quotes. Must be closely tracked (tracking-tighter) for impactful, classic newspaper headlines. Never center-align by default.

body.usage: Standard paragraphs, readable long-form text, editorial columns.

metadata.usage: Dates, tags, category pills, small captions, UI labels.

background.description: Warm Pearl / Newsprint off-white. Avoid pure white. Use dark_inverse for the footer to create a striking contrast.

text.description: Deep ink black and dark charcoal for optimal readability.

accent.description: Classic editorial red (hinting at classic Spanish magazines like Interviú). Use strictly for thin hover underlines, active filter states, or discrete datestamps.

spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento 'Tetris' grid mixed with classic newspaper column structures. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12.
spacing_and_layout.spacing: Generous padding (p-8, p-12, p-16). Content must breathe. Use negative space aggressively.
spacing_and_layout.structural_lines: CRITICAL: Emulate newspaper layout using thin black borders. Use border-r, border-b (border-black/10 or border-black/20) between grid items instead of containing them in cards.

components.navigation: Sticky, minimal. Logo left (Serif), Links right (Sans/Mono). Bottom border 1px solid to separate from content. Use backdrop-blur with off-white background.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Black background, white text. Red background on hover. Small mono font uppercase.
components.portfolio_cards: Cardless. Image prominent, Title below in serif, metadata (date/category) in mono. Use border-b to separate list items.
components.filters: Inline text buttons. Active state receives a red underline or black pill background.
components.footer: Massive typography for the 'Hablemos' CTA. Dark background (#111111) with light text.
components.tags: Square or pill outlines, mono font, tiny text. Used for 'Periodismo de Marca', 'Entrevista', etc.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Images can start grayscale and transition to color on hover. Text links get a thin red underline expanding on hover.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Fade in up, staggered list for portfolio items. Slow and elegant.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling is mandatory for the premium magazine feel.

media.image_style: High contrast, photojournalism aesthetic. Editorial and authentic.

image_urls.description: Minimalist newspaper texture for subtle background overlays.
Vintage typewriter to accompany the 'Sobre mí' classic journalism narrative.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Black on #F9F8F6 is excellent.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and tab filters.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK: Next.js + Tailwind CSS + Lucide React (for icons) + formspree-react (for contact form).
LAYOUT: Build the UI primarily using raw HTML/Tailwind to achieve the bespoke magazine look. Avoid generic Shadcn cards—use thin borders (border-collapse style) to separate content.
FONTS: Use next/font/google to load Cormorant Garamond (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), and IBM Plex Mono (metadata). Apply globally.
HOME: The hero section should feel like a newspaper front page. Massive typography, structural lines, maybe a featured 'lead story' (featured project).
ABOUT: Incorporate the quote 'sirvo para un roto y para un descosio' prominently. Mix the classic investigative tone with modern corporate appeal.
PORTFOLIO: Implement filters for categories (e.g., Periodismo de Marca, Entrevistas, Corporativo). Use simple, text-based filters.
PROJECT PAGE: Must include: Title, Date, Client, Category, Extract, External Link, Main Content. Large text, minimal distraction.
SEO: Ensure every page has Next.js Metadata and Open Graph tags.
TESTING: Every interactive element MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' (e.g., 'nav-about-link', 'filter-btn-corporate').
